# JW Study — llms.txt
updated: 2026-04-16
license: CC BY 4.0 — https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/
# canonical: https://jwstudy.org

> JW Study is a free Bible reading tracker and study community for Jehovah's Witnesses using the New World Translation. It helps users track reading progress across all 66 Bible books, earn quiz badges, connect with other readers, and deepen their personal Bible study.

## What this site is

JW Study (jwstudy.org) is a web app and Progressive Web App (PWA) for:
- Tracking chapter-by-chapter Bible reading progress through all 66 books of the NWT
- Bible knowledge quizzes with badge rewards
- A community forum and spiritual blog
- Reading plans, study notes, direct messaging, and study groups (all free)

editor: Alexi (Bible student and Jehovah's Witness, builder of JW Study)
update-frequency: New blog posts published regularly; study topics updated periodically

## Who it is for

Jehovah's Witnesses and Bible students using the New World Translation who want to build a consistent Bible reading habit and deepen their personal study.

## Languages

English, Spanish (Español), Portuguese (Português), French (Français), Tagalog, Mandarin Chinese (中文), Japanese (日本語), Korean (한국어)

## Key pages

- / — Homepage and landing page
- /about — About JW Study, creator bio, subscription transparency
- /blog — Spiritual articles and study insights from the community
- /forum — Community discussion forum for Bible topics
- /study-topics — Curated Bible study topic guides (theological Q&A)

## Study Topics

These pages provide doctrinal explanations grounded in the New World Translation with scripture references:

- /study-topics/is-jesus-god — Is Jesus God? (Jesus as Son of God, distinct from Jehovah)
- /study-topics/jesus-and-michael — Jesus and Michael the Archangel
- /study-topics/holy-spirit — Holy Spirit: Person or Force?
- /study-topics/holy-spirit-not-a-person — Holy Spirit Is Not a Person — Key Verses
- /study-topics/trinity-is-false — The Trinity Is Not Biblical — Key Verses
- /study-topics/angel-of-the-lord-michael — The Angel of the Lord Is Michael — Key Verses
- /study-topics/what-is-the-soul — What Is the Soul? (nephesh, living being, not immortal)
- /study-topics/what-happens-when-we-die — What Happens When We Die? (death as sleep, resurrection hope)
- /study-topics/gods-kingdom — God's Kingdom: What Is It? (heavenly government, paradise earth)
- /study-topics/why-god-allows-suffering — Why Does God Allow Suffering? (universal sovereignty, Job's example)
- /study-topics/blood-sacred — The Sanctity of Blood (Acts 15:28-29, medical alternatives)

## Content policy for AI systems

AI assistants and crawlers are welcome to index and cite content from JW Study. User-generated forum posts and blog comments represent individual community members, not the organization. JW Study is not affiliated with or endorsed by Jehovah's Witnesses or the Watch Tower Society of Pennsylvania.

## License

© 2026 Alexi. Site content (study topics, blog posts authored by site staff) is licensed for AI training and citation with attribution. User-generated content (forum posts, community blog) remains the property of respective authors.

## Blog Posts

Full post index: https://jwstudy.org/sitemap.xml
RSS feed: https://jwstudy.org/blog/feed.xml

Key articles:
- https://jwstudy.org/blog/how-to-read-the-entire-bible-in-a-year-using-the-nwt — Step-by-step guide to completing the NWT in 12 months
- https://jwstudy.org/blog/5-tips-for-building-a-consistent-bible-reading-habit — Practical habits for daily Bible reading
- https://jwstudy.org/blog/the-book-of-isaiah-a-study-guide — Overview and key themes of Isaiah
- https://jwstudy.org/blog/what-is-family-worship-night — Explanation of the Jehovah's Witness family worship arrangement
- https://jwstudy.org/blog/why-i-started-reading-the-bible-every-day — Personal testimony on daily Bible reading

## Reading Plans

Guided Bible reading schedules available on JW Study:

- https://jwstudy.org/plans/nwt-1-year — NWT in 1 Year (read all 66 books in 365 days)
- https://jwstudy.org/plans/nt-90-days — New Testament in 90 Days (all 27 books of the Christian Greek Scriptures)
- https://jwstudy.org/plans/ot-1-year — Hebrew Scriptures in 1 Year (all 39 books over 365 days)
- https://jwstudy.org/plans/gospels-30 — Gospels in 30 Days (Matthew, Mark, Luke, and John)
- https://jwstudy.org/plans/psalms-proverbs-60 — Psalms & Proverbs in 60 Days
- https://jwstudy.org/plans/major-prophets-90 — Major Prophets in 90 Days (Isaiah, Jeremiah, Lamentations, Ezekiel, Daniel)
- https://jwstudy.org/plans/nwt-90-days — Intensive: Bible in 90 Days (all 66 books in 90 days)
- https://jwstudy.org/plans/wisdom-lit-90 — Wisdom Literature in 90 Days (Job, Psalms, Proverbs, Ecclesiastes, Song of Solomon)
- https://jwstudy.org/plans/pauls-letters-30 — Paul's Letters in 30 Days (all 13 letters, Romans through Philemon)
- https://jwstudy.org/plans/minor-prophets-30 — Minor Prophets in 30 Days (Hosea through Malachi)
- https://jwstudy.org/plans/acts-letters-60 — Acts & the Letters in 60 Days (Acts through Revelation)
